title: Cross-linking of IgG to Protein A or G Beads (S1425/S1430)

steps: The IgG immobilization protocol is for the binding of 20 µg, purified IgG or isolation of 20 µg, IgG from serum . Vortex and thoroughly resuspend Protein A Magnetic Beads.
Aliquot 100 µL, bead suspension to a sterile microcentrifuge tube.
Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 1/2)
Repeat wash: Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 2/2)
Add to the beads 80 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) .
Add 15 µL - 25 µL, serum OR 20 µg, purified IgG in a maximum volume of 30 µL .
Mix thoroughly and incubate at 4 °C with agitation for 00:30:00 .
Apply magnet and remove supernatant.
Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 1/3)
Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 2/3)
Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 3/3)

Add 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer (0.2 M triethanolamine, [pH 8.2]) to the Protein A/G immobilized antibody.(Wash 1/2) At this point the purified IgG can be eluted from the beads or used directly for immunoprecipitation of target proteins. The purified IgG can also be cross-linked to the Protein A beads (see cross-linking protocol) to create a reusable immunoprecipitation bead which prevents the co-elution of antibody with target protein.
Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 1/2)
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 1/2)
Add 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer (0.2 M triethanolamine, [pH 8.2]) to the Protein A/G immobilized antibody.(Wash 2/2)
Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 2/2)
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 2/2)
Resuspend in 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer containing 25 millimolar (mM), DMP (6.5 mg DMP/ml of buffer) .
Mix thoroughly and incubate at Room temperature for 00:45:00 with agitation.
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant.
Add 1 mL, Blocking Buffer (0.1 M ethanolamine, [pH 8.2]) .
Vortex to resuspend.
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant.
Add 1 mL, Blocking Buffer .
Vortex to resuspend.
Incubate for 00:30:00 at Room temperature with agitation.
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant.
Add 1 mL, PBS . (Wash 1/3)
Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 1/3)
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 1/3)
Add 1 mL, PBS . (Wash 2/3)
Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 2/3)
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 2/3)
Add 1 mL, PBS . (Wash 3/3)
Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 3/3)
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 3/3)
Add 1 mL, Elution Buffer (0.1 M glycine-HCl [pH 2.5]) .
Vortex to resuspend.
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. This elutes bound antibody that is not cross-linked with DMP.
Resuspend and store beads in 100 µL, PBS , 0.1% Tween 20, 0.02% sodium azide.
Add 1 mL, PBS . (1/2)
Vortex to resuspend. (1/2)
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (1/2)
Add 1 mL, PBS . (2/2)
Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (2/2)
Vortex to resuspend. (2/2)
